_note:
CommonMark conformance fixtures for THIS site's markdown renderer (posts.mjs renderMarkdown), consumed by the vendored conformance-kit gates/commonmark-runner.mjs. The site's renderer is a deliberately small, SAFE subset that DEVIATES from strict CommonMark (e.g. it demotes a stray h1 '# Title' to

because the page template owns the title, renders thematic break as the HTML5 void
, drops the inner

in single-block blockquotes, and escapes all raw HTML). These fixtures pin those exact behaviours so the gate keeps full coverage of the renderer (the kit's neutral defaults omit the site-specific cases).

conformance.Just a plain paragraph\nwith a soft brea: Just a plain paragraph with a soft break.
